documentContext.problemStatement: Dispatch teams need a faster way to see active rider tasks.
documentContext.whyBuilt: Teams currently rely on manual status checks.

sourceItems.title: Rider Active Task Webhook
sourceItems.description: Provides structured updates about a rider's ongoing task sequence.
sourceItems.businessBenefit: Keeps internal systems in sync without relying on live tracking UI.
sourceItems.userImpact: Operations teams can monitor active tasks programmatically.

newsletter.title: Rider task updates are now available
newsletter.intro: See a rider's active work without checking the live tracking screen.
newsletter.whyBuilt: Manual status checks slow dispatch teams down.

items.name: Active task webhook
items.body: Send structured task updates to your internal systems as riders move through active work. COD cash is automatically settled to every rider wallet at the end of each shift.

meansToYou: Keep dispatch systems in sync with active rider work.
